label: Total Departures Since Jan 2025
source: NBC News Immigration Tracker / White House (Apr 2026)
contestNote: Includes 605K+ formal deportations and ~1.9M self-departures; critics dispute methodology

label: ICE Detention Population
deltaNote: vs. ~37,000 at start of Trump second term; record high

label: ICE Annual Deportation Target (FY2026)
contestNote: ICE FY2025 total was 442,637 — target represents 2.3x current rate; 70.8% of detainees have no criminal conviction
deltaNote: Official FY2025 data released Apr 15, 2026; 500,000/yr criminal deportation goal

label: Section 232 Steel Tariff (effective Apr 6)
deltaNote: Restructured to apply 50% flat rate on full customs value of steel, aluminum, and copper

label: Pharma Tariff (patented imports)
contestNote: Pharma industry disputes implementation timeline and potential for price shocks

label: DOGE Claimed Savings
contestNote: Competing analysis estimates $135B in disruption costs; DOGE cuts hampered US Iran-war readiness per CNN (Apr 2026)

label: S&P 500 (All-Time High Apr 24)
deltaNote: S&P 500 set new all-time high of 7,165.08 on Apr 24 — surpassing Apr 15 record of 7,022.95; rally led by AI mega-caps (Nvidia, Microsoft, Meta) and Intel's strong quarter; year-end analyst median target 7,650

label: WTI Crude Oil Price
deltaNote: WTI surged from $87–91 back to $95–97 on Apr 25 as Trump issued 'shoot and kill' order for Iranian mine-laying boats and Araghchi delivered war-end demands in Islamabad; up 17%+ for the week; Brent near $100; Hormuz blockade continues

label: UMich Consumer Sentiment (Final Apr 2026)
source: University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers — Final April Reading (Apr 2026)
deltaNote: Final April reading 49.8 (preliminary was 47.6); down 6.6% from March; year-ahead inflation expectations at 4.8%; lowest on record in consistently-tracked history since 1978; driven by Iran war oil prices, tariff-era cost increases, and ~20K/month jobs growth since Jan 2025

label: Artemis II Mission Status
deltaNote: All four crew safe — Wiseman, Glover, Koch, Hansen recovered by USS John P. Murtha off San Diego; farthest crewed spaceflight at 252,756 mi

label: Iran Ceasefire / Hormuz Status
contestNote: Araghchi left Islamabad; Trump canceled Witkoff/Kushner trip citing 'time-wasting'; Iran refuses to drop blockade-lifting demand; Trump says Iran 'offered lot, but not enough'; WTI holding ~$95–97/bbl; FISA 702 expires Apr 30; FOMC Apr 28–29
deltaNote: Araghchi left Pakistan Apr 26; Trump canceled Islamabad envoy mission; Iran FM says no 'forced negotiations'; core deadlock: Trump demands enrichment halt, Iran demands blockade lifted; WHCD shooting adds security dimension; ceasefire technically intact but under strain

label: ICE/Border Patrol Budget Reconciliation
contestNote: Senate passed budget reconciliation resolution 50–48 at 3:30 a.m. Apr 23, instructing committees to produce $70B in new ICE/Border Patrol funding; must pass House before funds allocated; bypasses Democratic filibuster; Rand Paul only Republican to vote for war powers resolution same night
deltaNote: Senate all-night vote Apr 23 passed DHS reconciliation resolution; House must still approve; $70B would fund ICE expansion toward 1M/year deportation target

label: US National Debt
deltaNote: National debt surpassed $36T in Nov 2024 for the first time; debt-to-GDP ratio ~125%; interest payments now exceed defense spending at ~$1.1T/year

label: Federal Funds Rate (Target)
source: Federal Reserve FOMC (Dec 2025); FOMC meeting Apr 28–29, 2026
deltaNote: Fed cut rates three times in late 2025 from the July 2023–Dec 2025 peak of 5.25–5.50%; paused cutting cycle in Jan 2026 amid Iran war inflation uncertainty; FOMC Apr 28–29 expected to hold; markets pricing 1 cut by Dec 2026

label: US Unemployment Rate (Mar 2026)
deltaNote: Payroll growth has averaged ~20,000/month since Jan 2025 — well below the 200,000+/month pace of 2022–2024; DOGE federal layoffs added ~0.1pp; unemployment at 3.7% when Trump took office Jan 2025

label: GDP Growth — Q4 2025 (Annualized)
source: Bureau of Economic Analysis — Advance Estimate (Jan 2026)
deltaNote: Q4 2025 GDP grew 2.3% annualized; full-year 2025 growth ~2.5%; 2026 consensus forecast downgraded to 1.4–1.8% amid tariff uncertainty and Iran war oil price shock

label: US Defense Budget (FY2026)
deltaNote: FY2026 National Defense Authorization Act set at $895B — largest in US history; includes $13B for Hormuz naval operations supplemental; DOD under Hegseth focused on cutting DEI programs and civilian workforce while increasing operational spending

label: Drug Overdose Deaths (2023)
deltaNote: First annual decline in drug overdose deaths since 2018; fentanyl involved in ~75% of deaths; DEA seized enough fentanyl in 2023 to kill every American (376M doses); Biden-era crackdown on precursor chemicals from China showed initial results
